title: axonopus longicilius
intro: Axonopus longicilius, also known as the Axonopus grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in various medicinal preparations due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Axonopus longicilius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In traditional herbal medicine, Axonopus longicilius is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in the form of extracts and tinctures for its medicinal properties.
